name: Socrata Open Data API (SODA)
description: The Socrata Open Data API (SODA) provides programmatic access to open government datasets hosted on Socrata-powered data portals. Supports querying via SoQL (Socrata Query Language) with filtering, aggregation, geospatial queries, and multiple export formats.
